<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/26.0.16 Chrome/132.0.6834.196 Electron/34.2.0 Safari/537.36" version="26.0.16"> <diagram name="Diligence War Room" id="0"> <mxGraphModel dx="-734" dy="-171" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1420" pageHeight="650" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="2" value="Startup-Diligence War Room — end-to-end flow" style="text;html=1;fontSize=22;fontStyle=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontColor=#1a1a1a;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="40" y="18" width="900" height="32" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="3" value="Multiple people ask · multiple agents research with cited sources · findings stream into one shared sheet (no-clobber) · forecasts + hand-off drafts out." style="text;html=1;fontSize=12;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontColor=#666666;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="40" y="48" width="1200" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="10" value="① Users" style="swimlane;startSize=28;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="40" y="100" width="250" height="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="11" value="Maya
startup banking + treasury" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;" parent="10" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="15" y="44" width="220" height="72" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="12" value="Dev
finance automation" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;" parent="10" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="15" y="128" width="220" height="72" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="13" value="Sam
spend management" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;" parent="10" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="15" y="212" width="220" height="72" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="20" value="② Agents

per user · per company
self-directed:
skills.md + minimal tools" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=middle;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="340" y="190" width="250" height="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="30" value="③ Deep-research loop — companyResearchPlan (per pending / stale row)" style="swimlane;startSize=30;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f3ecf8;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="640" y="100" width="450" height="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="31" value="1 · read row + room context" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=12;" parent="30" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="46" width="410" height="52" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="32" value="2 · fetch_source ×2 — cited, SSRF-bounded" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=12;" parent="30" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="110" width="410" height="52" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="33" value="3 · source-backed CellPayload
evidence · confidence · status" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=12;" parent="30" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="174" width="410" height="58" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="34" value="4 · write via CAS → needs_review on weak sources
↺ next pending row" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=12;" parent="30" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="244" width="410" height="58" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="40" value="④ Shared sheet
Company Research CRM
(Convex artifact)

Mercury · Ramp · Brex …" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="1150" y="120" width="230" height="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="41" value="every write via per-element CAS
→ no agent clobbers a human or another agent" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=11;fontColor=#2d6a3e;fontStyle=2;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="1150" y="312" width="230" height="64" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="50" value="⑤ Runway & milestone forecast — runwayForecaster
→ deterministic runway chart (SVG, no chart lib)
honest: a still-burning company is never "cash-flow positive"" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="640" y="470" width="450" height="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="60" value="⑥ Hand-off drafts — downstreamPublish
Linear · Notion · Gmail · Slack · LinkedIn
ROADMAP: drafts prepared; live OAuth pending" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#999999;dashed=1;fontSize=12;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="1150" y="470" width="230" height="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="70" value="ask: research these companies" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" parent="1" source="10" target="20" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="71" value="spawn research" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.4;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" parent="1" source="20" target="30" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="72" value="source-backed write (CAS)" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#82b366;" parent="1" source="30" target="40" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="73" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.9;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" parent="1" source="40" target="50" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="74" value="organized findings + charts" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" parent="1" source="50" target="60" edge="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
